title: bupleurum falcatum subsp. exaltatum
intro: Bupleurum falcatum subsp. exaltatum, also known as Chinese bupleurum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum falcatum subsp. exaltatum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it accessible for herbal remedies.
